what: Implement CreateProject command handler for valid inputs, persisting the new project and setting it as active in the same successful command execution path.

where.description: Create command type and handler orchestrating domain creation and repository save.
Add integration-style command tests using in-memory ports.
Export command handler for route layer consumption.

acceptance.given: A valid create command with unique path and valid validator result
acceptance.then: Exactly one project is saved and returned as active with updated lastUsedAt.
No project is saved and the handler returns a typed create failure.

nonGoals: No full error matrix coverage beyond one invalid path guard

patterns.name: Use-case Orchestration
patterns.reference: clean architecture skill: usecase orchestrates entities and ports

context: This tracer-bullet command proves end-to-end project creation flow works before expanding edge-case coverage.
technicalNotes: Write one failing test first and pass it with minimal orchestration code. Merge-safe: isolated command file plus tests and exports. Models: Codex gpt-5.2-codex (medium), Claude Sonnet 4.6 (medium).
